ocr_findings.description: Mascot/character image ('試験にはコレが出る！' callout box graphic) rendered as plain text '試験にはつしが出る！' — the dog mascot icon is expected to be lost, cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering IoT-related terms (ドローン, コネクテッドカー, スマートファクトリー, インダストリー4.0) in a table, followed by explanations of 組込みシステム and 組込みソフトウェア. Table accurately captured with all four rows. Summary callout box text captured with minor mascot-icon rendering difference (cosmetic).
